---
title: "Fermi Estimation for Neural Networks"
author: "Yuxi Liu"
date: "2023-12-05"
date-modified: "2023-12-05"

categories: [AI, economics]
formats:
    myblog-html:
        toc: true

description: "The bitter lesson in bite-sized packets."
image: "figure/banner_5.png"

status: "finished"
confidence: "highly likely"
importance: 10
---

## Introduction

![](figure/banner_5.png)
$$E = mc^2$$

## More Information

You can learn more about controlling the appearance of HTML output here: <https://quarto.org/docs/output-formats/html-basics.html>
